answers.answer: B) CREATE INDEX idx ON orders(customer_id, status, created_at DESC). Reason: Composite index should match WHERE clause equality filters first (customer_id, status), then include ORDER BY column (created_at DESC) to leverage index ordering and avoid additional sort. This index covers all filtering and sorting requirements of the query.

Task Scheduler Implementation in TypeScript: Created TaskScheduler class with: 1) Cron parsing supporting */N intervals and basic expressions, 2) schedule() for recurring tasks and scheduleOnce() for one-time tasks, 3) Task lifecycle management (pending->running->completed/failed), 4) Concurrency control via maxConcurrency limit, 5) Dependency tracking with dependsOn array, 6) Retry logic with exponential backoff (2^retryCount * 1000ms), 7) Task cancellation via cancel() method, 8) Pluggable storage interface with InMemoryStorage implementation, 9) Timeout detection that fails tasks exceeding timeout, 10) tick() method that schedules pending tasks respecting concurrency and dependencies. Key methods: schedule, scheduleOnce, runTask, dependenciesSatisfied, failTask, cancel.
